creator: admin@5034.ru
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #2)


There is a opinion that this is old php bug linked with order of loading php modules (and mod_php too).

This is my module list:

# php -m
[PHP Modules]
bcmath
bz2
Core
ctype
curl
date
dom
filter
gd
gettext
hash
iconv
imap
intl
json
ldap
libxml
mbstring
mysqli
mysqlnd
openssl
pcntl
pcre
PDFlib
PDO
pdo_sqlite
Phar
posix
pspell
readline
recode
Reflection
session
SimpleXML
soap
SPL
sqlite3
standard
tokenizer
xml
xmlreader
xmlrpc
xmlwriter
xsl
Zend OPcache
zip
zlib

[Zend Modules]
Zend OPcache
